title: One Night... a Train
actors: Yves Montand, Anouk Aimée, Adriana Bogdan
plot: Mathias is a Belgian linguist, living with French theatre producer Anne. After a quarrel about moral questions, they take a train to attend a congress. While Mathias sleeps, Anne disappears. The train stops in the middle of the co...
language: Dutch, French, Persian, English, German, Latin
